data.body: AC evidence: change 709 (Change-Id I9a31d6a) LANDED on main via Gerrit — status MERGED — with LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1 (GitHub Actions CI green on both ubuntu + macos matrix legs after the cross-platform actionlint fix: zizmor runs on all hosts, actionlint installs the pinned linux binary only on Linux and skips cleanly on macOS). make lint + typecheck clean; the release.yml zizmor/actionlint audit is gated on the ubuntu CI leg where release.yml runs. Held-out oracle: 16 passed / 3 skipped locally (sha256sum -c tests run on GNU CI); real zizmor teeth-verified (unpin -> error[unpinned-uses]); real actionlint clean. The mcp-publisher pin correctness is operator-attested above (make verify-mcp-pin OK).
